app.title: Guardian Connector Landing Page
app.welcomeSubtitle: Access your dashboards, manage workflows, and explore data securely within your {gc}.
app.guardianConnectorTooltip: Guardian Connector is a free and open-source Indigenous data sovereignty platform for community organizations to securely centralize, access, and derive insights from their environmental and cultural data.

auth.pleaseSignInToAccess: Please sign in to access your community tools

roles.signedInDescription: Signed in but with no special privileges

dataSources.comapeoDescription: Offline-first mobile app for community-led territory mapping and monitoring
dataSources.heading: Bring your data into Guardian Connector
dataSources.kobotoolboxDescription: Mobile data collection forms for surveys, censuses, and research
dataSources.odkDescription: Open-source forms platform built on an open data standard
dataSources.otherDescription: Guardian Connector can ingest data from many sources, including:
dataSources.subheading: Guardian Connector comes alive with your data. Use the data collection or annotation tools that you already use and trust — Guardian Connector is integrated with these, and more.
dataSources.timelapseDescription: Desktop tool for reviewing and tagging camera trap imagery

services.explorerDescription: Map, gallery, alerts, wildlife, and other data exploration views
services.needHelp: Need help? Visit the Guardian Connector
services.noServicesDescription: No services are currently deployed or accessible.
services.windmillDescription: Workflow automation and script execution platform

userManagement.approvedUsersDescription: Approved users can access the application with their assigned roles
userManagement.searchPlaceholder: Search users by email or name...
userManagement.subtitle: Manage user roles and approval status
userManagement.title: User Management
